2-Year Furniture Protection Plan
from Asurion, LLC
4.3 524
  • No Additional Cost: You pay nothing for repairs – parts, labor, and shipping included.
  • Coverage: Coverage starts after the 30-day return period. Stains, rips or tears, seam separation, and more are covered. Defects in materials or workmanship covered after the manufacturer warranty expires.
  • Easy Claims Process: File a claim anytime online or by phone. Most claims approved within minutes. We will send you an e-gift card for the purchase price of your covered product. In some instances, we will replace or repair it.
  • Product Eligibility: Plan must be purchased with a product or within 30 days of the product purchase. Pre-existing conditions are not covered.
  • Terms & Details: More information about this protection plan is available within the “Product guides and documents” section. Simply click “User Guide” for more info. Terms & Conditions will be available in Your Orders on Amazon. Asurion will also email your plan confirmation with Terms & Conditions to the address associated with your Amazon account within 24 hours of purchase.

from Asurion, LLC
4.0 7035
  • ONE SIMPLE PROTECTION PLAN: Simplify protection for your eligible Amazon purchases. Coverage begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • NORTON 360 DELUXE INCLUDED: Trusted digital security that keeps your devices and data safer. Includes scam detection for emails and texts ($89.99 in annual savings).
  • INSTANT COVERAGE: Covers malfunctions and failures for eligible Amazon purchases, plus drops or spills for portable items. File claims right away — no waiting period.
  • QUICK AND EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at Asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement — up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. You’re covered for up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Cancel anytime – your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout do not renew monthly)

      Learn more
      Our expert solutions make it easy:

      Professional assembly
      • Enjoy professional assembly of your new furniture item.
      • Our third-party service providers will unpack your new item, inspect it for any visible damage, and assemble it as per the product instructions if no defects or damage are found.
      • For safety, the service provider will not move the item to a different location after it's been assembled.
      • The providers will clean up their work area and dispose of all packaging materials in your designated trash bin. Large boxes will be broken down for you to throw away.
      • An adult must be present during the service appointment.

      No service available

      See more

      About this item

      • 【Spacious space】This Executive office desk has a spacious desktop. The desktop size is 55"L*23.6" W. The computer table provides ample space for files, computers, printers. It features 3 drawers and storage cabinet which can accommodate a large number of files, books, and other office essentials. Three additional drawers feature metal runners and safety stops to keep you and your family safe.
      • 【3 Storage Drawers】Elevate your organizational with our meticulously designed Modular Drawer System. The writing desk with drawers can be for full-size printers, files, books, or other items, leaving large space for writing, studying, and other home office desk activities. Keep your essentials neatly organized with 3 thoughtfully designed drawers.
      • 【Modern Design】Information about the meticulous attention to detailstyle elements of this desk makes it a perfect addition to any home. Create a one-of-a-kind work environment when you add the sophisticated charm and design of this office desk from the collection. It's finished on all sides for versatile placement throughout your office. Detailed with attractive hardware, this handsome desk will have your office space looking good in no time.
      • 【Multifunctional Computer Desk】Create a versatile workstation that’ll meet all your needs with this all-in-one office desk with large computer desktop. Beyond a computer workstation, writing desk, executive desk, study table, whether it’s your home office, bedroom, or study, offering versatile functionality to suit your needs.
      • 【Solid Construction & high quality material】Crafted from high-quality wood, the sturdy construction and thickened table top provide durability and stability. Drawers and cabinet storage provide convenient organization for a clutter-free workspace.
      • 【Easy Assemble & After-sales Service】To make assembling this sturdy home office desk as effortless as possible, we have included clear and detailed instructions, numbered parts. If your item arrives damaged, scratched or missing part, please feel free to contact us, we will send you free replacemen as soon as possible.
      › See more product details

      Product description

      55" Executive Desk with 3 Drawers

      Spacious Office Desk

      Computer Desk with 3 Drawers

      More Detail for this Office Desk

      Sturdy Metal Leg

      This computer desk has a stable frame crossbar to make the gaming desk more stable.

      Adjustable Feet

      Anti-slip pads help eliminate wobble, it is adjustable to meet your different height needs for the table.

      High-Quality Slide Rail

      Computer desk with drawers is easy to pull when you put items.

      Natural Oak

      It has more stable legs and more weight for added stability

      Create a versatile workstation that’ll meet all your needs with this all-in-one office desk with large computer desktop.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find the desk beautiful and describe it as a quality piece of furniture. The assembly process is easy, with one customer noting that the instructions were clear.

      Product Summary: SEDETA 55" Executive Office Desk with 3 Drawers, Home Office Desk with Storage Drawers, Computer Writing Desk Study Table, Natural Oak

      From SEDETA

      4.5 out of 5 stars, 47 ratings

      Customer reviews

      100+ bought in past month

      Price

      One-time purchase: $149.98

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • 【Spacious space】This Executive office desk has a spacious desktop. The desktop size is 55"L*23.6" W. The computer table provides ample space for files, computers, printers. It features 3 drawers and storage cabinet which can accommodate a large number of files, books, and other office essentials. Three additional drawers feature metal runners and safety stops to keep you and your family safe.
      • 【3 Storage Drawers】Elevate your organizational with our meticulously designed Modular Drawer System. The writing desk with drawers can be for full-size printers, files, books, or other items, leaving large space for writing, studying, and other home office desk activities. Keep your essentials neatly organized with 3 thoughtfully designed drawers.
      • 【Modern Design】Information about the meticulous attention to detailstyle elements of this desk makes it a perfect addition to any home. Create a one-of-a-kind work environment when you add the sophisticated charm and design of this office desk from the collection. It's finished on all sides for versatile placement throughout your office. Detailed with attractive hardware, this handsome desk will have your office space looking good in no time.
      • 【Multifunctional Computer Desk】Create a versatile workstation that’ll meet all your needs with this all-in-one office desk with large computer desktop. Beyond a computer workstation, writing desk, executive desk, study table, whether it’s your home office, bedroom, or study, offering versatile functionality to suit your needs.
      • 【Solid Construction & high quality material】Crafted from high-quality wood, the sturdy construction and thickened table top provide durability and stability. Drawers and cabinet storage provide convenient organization for a clutter-free workspace.
      • 【Easy Assemble & After-sales Service】To make assembling this sturdy home office desk as effortless as possible, we have included clear and detailed instructions, numbered parts. If your item arrives damaged, scratched or missing part, please feel free to contact us, we will send you free replacemen as soon as possible.

      Product Description

      Size: 55 x 23.6 Inches

      Color: Natural Oak

      Features: Computer writing desk that will beautify your home office, study room, bedroom studio, which can be used as computer desk, gaming desk, writing table, home office desk. Simple but classic design fit perfectly. This spacious computer desk provides ample workspace for your home office setup. The desk features multiple drawers and storage compartments to keep your workspace organized and clutter-free.

      Package Content:

      1 x computer desk

      1 x Installation Tool

      1 x Install instruction Paper

      Tips:

      Please loosen all the screws first, especially the place where the table top combines, then gently pat the table top to make it leveled. When every part is OK, then tighten all the screws.If your item arrives damaged, scratched or missing part, please feel free to contact us, we will send you free replacement as soon as possible.
